docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY EDWARDS, KENNETH AS TO DEFENDANT PAPALE, DAVID 150 EUREKA STREET ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-24-2026 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF KENNETH EDWARDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID PAPALE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. PLAINTIIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, KENNETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAPALE, DAVID 150 EUREKA STREET ASSOCIATION $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
